name: Cardio Exercise
shortDescription: Any aerobic physical activity aimed at increasing heart rate and cardiovascular health.
instructions: Choose a form of movement such as jogging, jumping jacks, or burpees. Perform continuously at a moderate to vigorous intensity for the desired time or repetitions, maintaining proper posture and consistent breathing.
steps: Select a cardio activity (running, jumping jacks, etc).
Perform the chosen activity at a sustainable pace.
Maintain movement for set time or rounds.
breathing: Breathe rhythmically; exhale on exertion, inhale during lower intensity.
